headline: CarMax (KMX) Valuation Check As ChatGPT App Launch Highlights Its Latest Digital Milestone
summary: Why CarMax’s ChatGPT App Matters for Investors CarMax (KMX) has launched the first U.S. auto retail app in the ChatGPT app store, giving car shoppers and sellers an AI powered way to search inventory, explore listings, and check vehicle values. This new channel connects CarMax’s nationwide selection and offer tools directly to conversational search, which could influence how customers begin their buying and selling journeys and how investors think about the company’s digital capabilities. See...
